## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Exec and Growth X teams to discuss content production, SEO performance, and strategic initiatives.](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Content production back on track: 5 pieces published, 5 pending, 10 in progress (scaling from 5 to 10)](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Organic traffic showing upward trend: sessions and engaged sessions increasing, with 50-60% engagement rate](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [LLM traffic driving 1-5% of overall traffic; TragicPT and Perplexity key drivers with 50-60% engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Exec maintains 12th position in category rankings; need to expand tracking for sales-focused topics](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

## Topics

### Content Production and SEO Updates

  - [5 pieces published from two weeks ago, 5 pending publication soon](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [Production scaled from 5 to 10 pieces, back on track](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [SEO content in review, to be published in this week's batch](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=211.0)
  - [CTA updates delayed due to designer's paternity leave; deprioritized for now](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=257.0)

### Performance Metrics

  - [Upward trend in sessions and engaged sessions (last 14 days vs. previous 14 days)](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)
  - [50-60% engagement rate across the board (2+ page visits, 10+ seconds on site)](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=360.0)
  - [Blog driving non-branded keywords; homepage driving exec-related and branded terms](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Roleplay and management topics performing well](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=380.0)
  - [Conversion events (signups, book demo) aligned with session increases](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)
  - [Blog is key driver for conversions, balanced with homepage performance](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=521.0)

### SEO and Keyword Performance

  - [Exec is top branded query for clicks and impressions](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Non-branded queries contributing: corporate training, evaluation, leadership](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=658.0)
  - [Best AI roleplay platform page showing significant downward delta; Jo to investigate](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=443.0)
  - [Google reporting issue noted, affecting engagement session tracking](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=600.0)

### LLM Traffic and Platform Rankings

  - [LLMs driving 1-5% of overall traffic](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [TragicPT and Perplexity: key drivers with 50-60% engagement rates](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Copilot by Microsoft: lowest engagement but still performing well](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=706.0)
  - [Exec maintains 12th position in category rankings (1% decrease)](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)
  - [Need to expand tracking for sales-focused topics in Profound](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=753.0)

### Content Strategy and Optimization

  - [Review and update AI roleplay prompts for better coverage](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=865.0)
  - [Consolidate Platform/Tool/Software keywords under single URLs to avoid cannibalization](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Add variations to existing content for improved Google pickup](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=920.0)
  - [Plan to review and update Profound topics and prompts](https://fathom.video/share/hUSE7TjFvHQ2Ms3yvUcVzePmKqpVz8qb?tab=summary&timestamp=1061.0)
